query: SELECT SUM(CAST(totalAmountCHF AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as total_chf FROM portfolioTransactions WHERE portfolioId = 90001 AND DATE(transactionDate) = '2025-10-29' AND transactionType = 'buy'
